title: Is Copart (CPRT) Stock Outpacing Its Business Services Peers This Year?
text: Here is how Copart, Inc. (CPRT) and Crawford & Company B (CRD.B) have performed compared to their sector so far this year.

title: Copart (CPRT) Q4 Earnings & Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Copart (CPRT) reports fourth-quarter service revenues, accounting for 83.6% of the total revenues, of $834.2 million, outpacing our estimate of $784.8 million.

title: Copart, Inc. (CPRT) Q4 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Copart, Inc. (NASDAQ:CPRT ) Q4 2023 Earnings Conference Call September 14, 2023 5:30 PM ET Company Participants Jeff Liaw - Co-Chief Executive Officer Leah Stearns - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Bob Labick - CJS Securities Daniel Imbro - Stephens Craig Kennison - Robert W. Baird Bret Jordan - Jefferies Ryan Brinkman - JPMorgan Operator Good day, everyone, and welcome to Copart Incorporated Fourth Quarter Fiscal 2023 Earnings Call.

title: Copart, Inc. (CPRT) Surpasses Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Copart, Inc. (CPRT) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.34 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.31 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.28 per share a year ago.

title: Copart Reports Fourth Quarter Fiscal 2023 Financial Results
text: DALLAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Copart, Inc. (NASDAQ: CPRT) today reported financial results for the quarter and year ended July 31, 2023. For the three months ended July 31, 2023, revenue, gross profit, and net income were $997.6 million, $457.6 million, and $347.8 million, respectively. These represent an increase in revenue of $114.2 million, or 12.9%; an increase in gross profit of $76.0 million, or 19.9%; and an increase in net income of $84.1 million, or 31.9%, respectively, from the same period.

title: Copart (CPRT) Gears Up for Q4 Earnings: Things to Consider
text: The Zacks Consensus Estimate for Copart's (CPRT) Q4 earnings per share and revenues is 31 cents and $950 million, respectively.

title: Copart, Inc. to Release Fourth Quarter Fiscal 2023 Results
text: DALLAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Copart, Inc. (NASDAQ: CPRT) announced today that it will release earnings for the fourth quarter of fiscal 2023 after 4:00 p.m. Eastern Time (3:00 p.m. Central) on Thursday, September 14, 2023. On Thursday, September 14, 2023, at 5:30 p.m. Eastern Time (4:30 p.m. Central), Copart will conduct a conference call to discuss the results for the quarter. The call will be webcast live and can be accessed via hyperlink at www.copart.com/investorrelations. A replay of the call.
